description: Prove that reversing a concatenation equals the concatenation of the reversed lists in opposite order.
preamble:
def reverse {α : Type} : List α → List α
  | []      => []
  | x :: xs => reverse xs ++ [x]
statement:
theorem reverse_append {α : Type} :
    ∀xs ys : List α,
      reverse (xs ++ ys) = reverse ys ++ reverse xs
